# Restacked Context Repository

## What this repo is

[TIER: Company / Domain / Project] context for [name].

Part of the Restacked context orchestration system.

All context files live in /context/.

## Personas and what they need

| Persona | Load these files |

|---|---|

| Consultant | COMPANY.md, TOOLCHAIN.md, DECISIONS.md, OPEN-QUESTIONS.md |

| Designer | COMPANY.md, VISUAL-IDENTITY-EXTERNAL.md, VISUAL-IDENTITY-INTERNAL.md, DESIGN-SYSTEM.md |

| Content Writer | COMPANY.md, GLOSSARY.md, VISUAL-IDENTITY-EXTERNAL.md, CUSTOMER.md |

| Vibe Coder | ROLES.md, SCHEMA.md, TYPES.md, API.md, GLOSSARY.md, CONVENTIONS.md, AI-WORKFLOW.md |

| Full Stack Developer | SCHEMA.md, TYPES.md, API.md, CODEBASE-MAP.md, CONVENTIONS.md, DECISIONS.md, ROLES.md |

| Domain Expert | GLOSSARY.md, REGULATIONS.md, OPERATIONS.md, ROLES.md |

## Load order for any session

1. COMPANY.md - always first

2. AI-WORKFLOW.md - rules that govern how this team uses AI

3. DECISIONS.md - never contradict anything here

4. Role-specific files per persona table above

## Files in /context/

### Always load

- COMPANY.md - who we are, what we build, team
- AI-WORKFLOW.md - prototype/production rules, workflow constraints
- DECISIONS.md - architectural decisions, do not contradict

### Load for code tasks

- SCHEMA.md - data model, auto-generated
- TYPES.md - TypeScript interfaces, auto-generated
- API.md - function signatures, auto-generated
- CODEBASE-MAP.md - what exists and where, auto-generated
- CONVENTIONS.md - detected code patterns, auto-generated
- ROLES.md - user roles and permissions
- STANDARDS.md - coding conventions
- TOOLCHAIN.md - stack decisions and rationale

### Load for design and content tasks

- VISUAL-IDENTITY-EXTERNAL.md - customer-facing brand
- VISUAL-IDENTITY-INTERNAL.md - internal tool conventions
- DESIGN-SYSTEM.md - component library and tokens

### Load for domain tasks

- GLOSSARY.md - exact terminology, use these terms only
- REGULATIONS.md - compliance constraints
- OPERATIONS.md - how this domain actually works

### Load for planning and spec tasks

- CUSTOMER.md - customer profile, pain points, priorities
- OPEN-QUESTIONS.md - unresolved decisions, flag if your output touches these
- ACCESS.md - who has access to what

## Rules that always apply

- Prototype code is never deployed to production. Always rewritten.
- No direct backend calls in UI. Abstraction layer only.
- Never contradict DECISIONS.md. Flag conflicts explicitly.
- If output touches an item in OPEN-QUESTIONS.md, stop and flag it.
- Use exact terms from GLOSSARY.md. No synonyms.
- Role checks happen at the data layer, not just the UI.
- Backend architecture decisions happen in the backend project only.
- All knowledge produced in a session must be translated into context files before the next session.

```
